notes:
For basic printing functionality use the HPIJS driver . For advanced functionality such as printer status and maintenance features, use the HPLIP driver (which includes HPIJS).

Nearly the same as the DeskJet 840C/842C, but without parallel port, USB only. Ed: HP provides the HPLIP driver, which drives this printer excellently. See that driver entry for more information.

Consumables/Refills: HP #15 black, HP #17 color, ~$25 each
